SEARCH
Package compiler.ast.command

Class Command

java.lang.Object
compiler.ast.ASTNode
compiler.ast.command.Command
All Implemented Interfaces:
Cmd
Direct Known Subclasses:
ActionNode, CommandList, UpdateNode
public abstract class Command extends ASTNode implements Cmd
Base class for all command AST nodes. Commands represent actions that the critter can execute. A command is the "effect" part of a rule; when a rule's condition is true, its command executes. Command types include:
  • ActionNode: single action keywords (wait, forward, eat, etc.)
  • UpdateNode: memory assignments (mem[i] := value)
  • CommandList: sequences of updates followed by a terminal action
See Also:
  • ActionNode
  • UpdateNode
  • CommandList
  • Rule

    • Command

      protected Command(int line, int column, ASTNode... children)
      Initializes a Command node at the given source location.
      Parameters:
      line - source line number (1-based)
      column - source column number (1-based)
      children - direct child nodes in source order
